message.content:
@startuml
' Define custom styles to match the original diagram's appearance
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<Thread>> LightGreen
}
hide circle

class "Airport" <<C Thread>> as Airport {
list<Runway> lst_runways
list<AirportOperation> lst_operations
bool permission_to_take_off(Airplane)
bool permission_to_land(Airplane)
void start_thread()
}

note right of Airport : Iterate through lst_operations\nif it matches the criteria that airplane is already flying\nrelease runway\nupdate airplane status and related info\norder lst_operations to update next events

class "AirplaneState" <<E>> as AirplaneStateEnum {
Stopped
AskingPermissionToTakeOff
TakingOff
Flying
AskingPermissionToLand
Landing
Crashed
}

enum EnumAirportOperation {
WaitingToTakeOff
AuthorizedToTakeOff
WaitingToLand
AuthorizedToLand
}

class RunwayState <<E>> {
Free
InUse
}

class "Runway" <<C>> as RunwayClass {
uint32_t id
RunwayState state
}

class "AirportOperation" <<C>> as OperationClass {
Runway run_way
Airplane airplane
uint32_t time_request
uint32_t time_last_update
EnumAirportOperation operation_state
void free_runway()
}

class "Airplane" <<C Thread>> as PlaneClass {
uint32_t id
uint32_t fuel
uint32_t fuel_consumption_rate
uint32_t airport_answer_timeout
AirplaneState state
void start_thread()
void take_off_authorized()
void take_off_denied()
void land_authorized()
void land_denied()
}

' Relationships based on composition/aggregation diamonds in source image
Airport *-- RunwayClass
Airport *-- OperationClass
OperationClass o-- RunwayClass
OperationClass --o PlaneClass
PlaneClass --> AirplaneStateEnum
RunwayClass --> RunwayState
OperationClass --> EnumAirportOperation

@enduml
